name: Hashdex Commodities Trust
business: The Fund issues shares of beneficial interest representing fractional undivided beneficial interests in a portfolio consisting primarily of bitcoin, with the investment objective to track the Nasdaq Bitcoin Reference Price - Settlement (NQBTCS). Shares trade on NYSE Arca under the symbol DEFI and are available to investors through broker-dealers.

exposures.sentence: The Fund's assets consist of bitcoin and, potentially, limited amounts of cash.
